parsed.summary: The commit renames the npm scope and adds an interactive re-configuration menu to /glm:setup when already configured. Changes are confined to metadata files (package.json, plugin JSONs), markdown documentation (CHANGELOG, release_card), and a prompt template (commands/setup.md). No executable logic, no auth boundaries, no data mutations, no state management — purely declarative and documentation-level changes. No material defects found.
